_comment: Synthetic Teams channel posts for Northbridge Health Network. The 'Westgate EHR Rollout' channel is the per-clinic program channel (acl all — the external Lumina vendor participates). The 'Quality Program' channel is staff-only. Used for the multi-signal Westgate-status question and the cross-committee synthesis.

teams_messages.author: PPL-004
teams_messages.text: Westgate go-live status: build configured, end-user training ~80% done. Remaining blocker is the medication-list data migration validation. Target go-live still 22-JUN pending Lumina written confirmation.

teams_messages.author: PPL-010
teams_messages.text: Migration validation update: medication-list mapping is 90% validated, working the last reconciliation exceptions. On track for 13-JUN.

teams_messages.author: PPL-008
teams_messages.text: Lumina ready to issue the written go-live confirmation as soon as Northbridge signs off the migration validation. Trainers booked through 20-JUN to finish the remaining 20%.

teams_messages.author: PPL-001
teams_messages.text: Steering committee adopted the revised medication-reconciliation policy today — reconciliation at every transition of care. Angela owns the policy doc (CAPA-001), David owns the workflow. Both feed the Joint Commission readiness review.

teams_messages.author: PPL-007
teams_messages.text: Reminder for the readiness review: CAPA-004 (Westgate environment-of-care documentation) is still open and past due. Credentialing already closed the onboarding gap (CAPA-002). Med-rec policy (CAPA-001) is the other open item.
